  "findings": [
    "PVC expansion fitting omitted on long exterior run, which will lead to conduit buckling or pulling out of fittings due to thermal expansion and contraction."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Cut the PVC conduit run and install an approved expansion fitting (expansion joint) in accordance with thermal expansion calculations."
  ],
  "rationale": "NEC Article 352.44 requires an expansion fitting for PVC conduit where the change in length due to temperature variation is expected to be 0.25 inches or greater. Long exterior runs are subject to significant temperature swings, making the omission of an expansion fitting a code violation.",
  "references": [
    "NEC Article 352.44"
  ]
}
